title: Marketplace Manager - CaratLane Advisory Limited - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - CaratLane Advisory Limited - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with CaratLane Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About CaratLane Advisory Limited:
CaratLane Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CaratLane Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
